conflict: Clemence has proof, Lucien is grieving, and Vautrin offers Elise reinstatement if she will surrender the quarry map and testify cleanly.
consequence: Elise burns her last report and refuses Vautrin the map, but Lucien learns she was his assigned infiltrator and expels her from the inner life of the refuge.
must_land_beats: Clemence forces Elise to speak under her true name.
Vautrin offers a path back that is materially seductive and morally annihilating.
Lucien's discovery of the truth should land as both political and erotic betrayal.
objective: Win enough time to explain herself before the police close in again.
